events.label: reasoning
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Forms not oiled prior to concrete placement",
    "Lack of form release agent will cause concrete to bond to forms",
    "Surface defects and spalling likely upon form removal"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop concrete placement immediately",
    "Apply approved form release agent to all contact surfaces",
    "Re-inspect forms before proceeding with pour"
  ],
  "rationale": "ACI 347 requires forms to be coated with a release agent to prevent bonding and ensure proper surface finish. Un-oiled forms will result in concrete adhesion, causing damage during stripping and producing a defective surface. This is a non-compliant condition that must be corrected before concrete placement.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347-04 Section 2.3.2",
    "ACI 347-14 Guide to Formwork for Concrete"
  ]
}
